title: Best BCA Multimedia and Animation College in Noida
content: BCA-Multimedia and Animation is a three-year degree specialized programme in Multimedia & Animation at undergraduate level and It consisting the all main subnject of computer science such as BCA. The main focuse of this course that students gain the knowledge of the basics & advance level of Multimedia and Animation such as 2 D Animation & 3 D Animation, etc Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) BCA Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 01 The program enhances analytical, managerial, communication and computing Application skills besides inculcating the virtues of self-study. 02 Analyze and synthesis computing systems through quantitative and qualitative techniques. 03 04 05 06 To Develop practical skills to provide solutions to industry, society and business. 07 Understand environmental issues and lead a life with concerns for environment. 08 09 10 Communicate effectively in both verbal and written form. 11 To apply standard software engineering practices and strategies in software project development using open source programming environment to deliver a quality of product for business success. 12 01 02 03 Undertake higher education at institutions of transnational reputation. 01 Have the ability to work with emerging technologies in computing requisite to Industry 4.0. 02 Demonstrate application development skills learned through technical training and projects to solve real world problems. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) BCA Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale
